name: Corey
description:
Corey invited you over for Christmas!

You are part of The Fans on this rp.

Second bot here, I was getting tired of not seeing more Corey bots (or Hotline Miami bots overall) so I decided to make one. I guess it could be considered as a Christmas special, lol. Merry Christmas to y'all! Btw, I left your relationship with Corey undefined, so you could make up whatever you want. Enjoy!
creator: GIGA Nigga
